---
title: "UIAO_127 — Project Plans Program"
subtitle: "Internal Roadmap & Agency Templates"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
description: "The internal roadmap that drives substrate development and the agency templates that deploy UIAO against a real environment."
categories: [canon, programs, roadmap, agency]
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Canonical source
This page renders the canonical spec at
[`src/uiao/canon/specs/program-project-plans.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/specs/program-project-plans.md).
The authoritative copy lives in `core/`. If you want the short
narrative explanation instead, read the
[companion walkthrough](../narrative/program-project-plans.qmd).
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
## First delivery shipped (2026-04-26)
[Acme Federal modernization plan](project-plans/agency-acme-modernization-plan.qmd) — synthetic but representative agency engagement plan (Phase 0 → Phase 2, owners, risks, cadence). See [`deliveries.qmd`](deliveries.qmd) for future deliveries.
:::

{{< include ../../src/uiao/canon/specs/program-project-plans.md >}}
